  • Uses of CardPlaying in View.CLI

    Methods in View.CLI with parameters of type CardPlaying
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    StationMatrix.addCardsToStation(CardPlaying[][] station, int max)
    this method adds the cards to the station matrix, so that they can be printed. 40x40 is the position of the starting card
    Method parameters in View.CLI with type arguments of type CardPlaying
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    StationMatrix.printStation(HashMap<ArrayList<Integer>,CardPlaying> playingStationMap)
    this method prints the station of a player distant ato most by max from the starting card. 120 to 122 and 280 to 286 is the position of the starting card.
